<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Downloads the given file from a build's data."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{project}/versions/{version}/builds/{build}/downloads/{download}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads the given file from a build's data.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
